channel.title: Posts on Welcome to Data2al
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Welcome to Data2al

item.description: Cert List (12 -> 17) Tableau CRM (Completed - Apr) Admin (2022) Platform App Builder (2022) Sales Cloud (2022) Service Cloud (2022) Platform Dev 1 (2022) Platfrom Dev 2 (2023) Advanced Admin (2023) Javascript 1 (2023) (Developer) Data Arch (2023) Sharing and Visibility (2023) **Application Architect (2023)
Not a Blog How to Write Articles 04/11/2022 Good Police and Yakuza Principles 04/10/2022 ‘Elden Ring’ - Battle on the Altus Plateau 04/??/2022 A Night with ‘Spencer’ 03/??/2022

‘Elden Ring’ - Battle on the Altus Plateau 04/??/2022 “As I woke up at the Site of Lost Grace, I peeked across the half-abandoned battlefield in the barren hill valleys below me. I could see the Knights and Soldiers of the Golden Order patrolling the area. Their slow movements betray their ill-state of fatigue. Like a madman, I charged into the nearest group of soldiers, hoping to eliminate any early threats before crossing the battlefield.

How to Write Articles 04/10/2022 Failure is the foundation of success. Success is the lurking-place of failure. When you’re writing articles, write them in a reverse pyramid. You do this, so when the editor is editing, he can cut from the bottom up when you’re running against a deadline. You always start with the conclusion Describe the most important things you have to say You follow up with the supporting details Finally, sum up by telling readers what you wrote again

A Night with ‘Spencer’ 03/??/2022 As the chill wind swept through the night, the trees rattled with the rhythmic tapping of the cold rain outside. I sat at my desk, brooding in the darkness, waiting for the title “Spencer” to appear on my computer screen. “Spencer” is a film that showcases an exaggerated version of Princess Diana’s Christmas dinner with the royal family, where she confronts her husband about his infidelity.

Good Police and Yakuza Principles 4/11/2022 I watched a couple episodes of “Tokyo Vice” and found that the book author that inspired the show, had some very good principles that he learned from both the Yakuza and the Police. I have listed those principles below and added comments explaining each one. 1. Learn to listen well. The main difference between hearing and listening is that listening deals with understanding or perceiving the sound waves, which have an in-depth meaning.

Salesforce Directory A AI Basics Common Industry Uses of AI KPI and AI by Industry Main Ingredients of AI Using AI in Business B-Z Salesforce Admin Salesforce Platform Basics Data Modeling Data Management Lightning Experience Mobile App User Engagement Reports and Dashboards for Lightning Experience

Common Industry Uses Marketing AI has a huge impact on email marketing. There’s a few questions that you can ask in regards to email: - Will your customers open the email - Will they click through it - Will they act on it - Will they unsub All the questions above can be potentially predicted using Yes-and-No predictions. You can send emails to prospects who are likely to open them without ubsubing.

Salesforce offers two main methods for importing data. Data Import Wizard this tool, accessible through the Setup menu, lets you import data in common standard objects, such as contacts, leads, accounts, as well as data in custom objects. It can import up to 50,000 records at a time. It provides a simple interface to specify the configuration parameters, data sources, and the field mappings that map the field names in your import file with the field names in Salesforce.

A data model is a way to model what database tables look like in a way that makes sense to humans. In Salesforce, we think about database tables as objects, we think about columns as fields, and rows as records. Salesforce supports several different types of objects. There are: standard objects custom objects external objects platform events BigObjects Standard objects are objects that are included with Salesforce. Common business objects like Account, Contact, Lead, and Opportunity are all standard objects.

Sales What they care about Opportunity to Win Ratio - Score Likelihood to Convert (Industry, Department, Location, Annual Revenue, Contact Title, Pitch Method) - Predict Time to Close (Industry, Department, Location, Annual Revenue, Contact Title, Number of Resources Assigned, Executive Sponsorship on Deal) - Surface Optimal Recommendations to Reps (Next best actions, such as if deal has been open for a long time, an executive should be on the call as well)

Main Ingredients of AI Yes-and-No Predictions Numeric Predictions Classifications Recommendations Yes-and-No Predictions generally comes in the form of a probability. These probabilities are sometimes converted into scores, such as on a numeric scale of 0 to 100. Numeric Predictions often power predictive forecasting, such as “how much revenue”, “how many days”. Classifications frequently use “deep learning” capabilities to operate on unstructured data like free text or images. Another type that may or may not use deep learning is “clustering”.

Salesforce Platform Basics Like any CRM, Salesforce stores your customer data, gives you processes to nurture prospective customers, and provides ways to collaborate with people you work with. Yet on top of that, it also comes with a lot of standard functionality, or out-of-the-box products and features that you can use to run your business. Sell to prospects and customers Leads and Opportunities to manage sales Help customers after the sale

Using AI in Business There are three steps to effectively utilizing AI in business. Decide What to Predict The first step in using AI is to figure out what you want to achieve. You can do so by clearly defining a measurable term that you are using to predict. Without a measurable term, it is impossible to make predictions. Get Historical Data in Order The second step is to obtain historical data.
